spec.name: The Realm Of Lost Souls
spec.description: You are standing in nothing. All around you there are stars. Sometimes a shadow flies closely by you, wailing very loudly. To the north there is a small bright hole. To the west there is a small red hole.

north.description: You look into a very bright hole.

west.description: You look into a red hole.

extra_descs.description: The shadow looks like a man in great pain.
